cards.name: 6 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: generosity, charity, community, material help, support, sharing, giving and receiving, gratitude

cards.name: 2 of Wands
cards.interpretation: planning, first steps, making decisions, leaving comfort, taking risks

cards.name: 2 of Swords, reversed
cards.interpretation: indecision, hesitancy, anxiety, too much information, no right choice, truth revealed
